heading: Subpoena
label: 7255 Subpoena
text: For the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this chapter, the Secretary, or his duly authorized agent or agents, shall have the same powers and authorities as the Federal Trade Commission under with respect to all functions vested in, or transferred or delegated to, the Secretary or such agents by this chapter. For purposes of carrying out its responsibilities under the Natural Gas Policy Act of 1978 [ et seq.], the Commission shall have the same powers and authority as the Secretary has under this section.section 49 of title 1515 U.S.C. 3301
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Department of Energy Organization Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 95–9191 Stat. 565section 7101 of this titleAug. 4, 1977The Natural Gas Policy Act of 1978, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified generally to chapter 60 (§ 3301 et seq.) of Title 15, Commerce and Trade. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 95–62192 Stat. 3350section 3301 of Title 15Nov. 9, 1978

Amendments1978— inserted provision giving the Commission the same powers and authority as the Secretary under this section for purposes of carrying out its responsibilities under the Natural Gas Policy Act of 1978.Pub. L. 95–621
